title: Can You Really Game From Anywhere With Starlink? In the Name of Science, I Had to Try
summary: I'm PCMag's Starlink tester, and I'm trying to figure out whether the popular satellite internet service from SpaceX—without which I wouldn't even have my job, since my area has no other fast internet options—is also good enough for gaming.
